MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-18-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT JEREMIAH SHAFFER's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

Defendant Jeremiah Shaffer's unopposed motion for summary judgment is granted.

Proposed order submitted.

Visiting Judge: John M. True; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JMT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Deeming Admitted Truth Of Facts And Genuineness Of Documents And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
Off Calendar Apr-25-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT JEREMIAH SHAFFER's Motion For Order Deeming Admitted Truth Of Facts And Genuineness Of Documents.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Jeremiah Shaffer's unopposed motion to deem the truth of any matters specified in his Requests for Admission, Set One, is granted. Plaintiff Westlake Services, LLC failed to respond to this discovery and has thereby waived objections. (CCP 2033.280(a).) The truth of any matters specified in the requests for admission is deemed admitted by Plaintiff. (CCP 2033.280(b), (c).)

CCP 2033.280(c) further provides that sanctions are mandatory in this circumstance, although Shaffer did not request them. The court awards sanctions of $100 payable by Plaintiff to Shaffer within 10 court days of entry of this order.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Mar-12-2025 Text Ruling
